entities.name: God

attributes.nature: Omnipotent, Incomprehensible, invisible and indissolative, Creator, Savior, Lord of all Creatures

entities.raw_quote: Omnipotent, Incomprehensible, invisible and indissolvable Lord God

entities.name: Jesus Christ

attributes.nature: eternal only begotten Son of God

entities.raw_quote: Oh Lord Jesus Christ, eternal only begotten Son of God

entities.name: Michael
entities.raw_quote: Michael, the Medicine of God; Raphael, the Fortitude of God, Gabriel ardens holy per Amassan

entities.name: Solomon
entities.raw_quote: the precedent work, is the beginning of the following Orations, which Solomon calleth Artem Novam.

entities.name: Artem Novam

attributes.description: The name Solomon gives to the Orations

entities.raw_quote: the following Orations, which Solomon calleth Artem Novam.

entities.name: First Oration of the 10

attributes.purpose: To acquire Memory, Eloquence and understanding, and stability

entities.raw_quote: This is the first Oration of the 10, which may be pronounced by its self... to acquire Memory, Eloquence and understanding

entities.name: Second Oration
entities.raw_quote: The next Oration is the second of ten, and giveth Eloquence

entities.name: Third Oration

attributes.purpose: To be said before the first Figure of Astronomy

entities.raw_quote: This is the third Oration of the ten, and is to be said before the first Figure of Astronomy.

entities.name: Golden Seal
entities.raw_quote: upon every Oration the sign of a golden Seal

entities.name: Fasting
entities.raw_quote: it is good to fast two or three dayes; that is may be Divinely revealed

entities.name: Chastity
entities.raw_quote: he that would Operate in this Art, let him be clean and chast by the space of nine dayes at least

entities.name: Helischemat azatan

attributes.context: part of a specific sequence of words/incantation

entities.raw_quote: in the fourth day Alpha and Omaega, and that following it, viz. Helischemat azatan

summary: This chunk details the 'Artem Novam' section of the Ars Notoria, providing specific instructions for performing various Orations to acquire knowledge, memory, and eloquence. It outlines required spiritual preparations such as fasting, chastity, and abstinence from sin, while presenting several specific prayers and incantations addressed to the Divine.
key_passages: it is good to fast two or three dayes; that is may be Divinely revealed, whether thy desires be good or evil.
This is the first Oration of the 10, which may be pronounced by its self, without any precedent work to acquire Memory, Eloquence and understanding
The next Oration is the second of ten, and giveth Eloquence, which ought to be said after the other; a little interval in between
he that would Operate in this Art, let him be clean and chast by the space of nine dayes at least
in the fourth day Alpha and Omaega, and that following it, viz. Helischemat azatan
